text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her debut race imminent, Mejiro Ardan
pushes herself until the last possible moment. The
fire in her eyes can only be described as a raging
inferno.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of Mejiro Ardan's debut. The race
begins and, concentrating intensely, she hits the
ground running.
